The '''''Paskla''-class cruiser''' was a type of vessel used in the [[Unknown Regions/Legends|Unknown Regions]]; the origins of the design are unknown, but it was apparently used by a variety of species and deployed in a number of different civilian and military configurations.

==Characteristics==
Although about half the size of a [[Dreadnaught-class heavy cruiser/Legends|''Dreadnaught'']] or a modern [[Bulk cruiser/Legends|bulk cruiser]] and technologically inferior to either, it was capable of serving as a potent warship by the standards of the [[Unknown Regions/Legends|Unknown Regions]]. Externally, it resembled a light-colored flattened sphere, and in at least some configurations, it carried a regular pattern of dark spots covering the [[Hull/Legends|hull]], which could be used as launch ports for [[Vagaari starfighter|Vagaari fighters]]; most of the cruiser's habitable volume was apparently taken up by small cabins, with the command center being the only large open area.<ref name="Survivor's Quest" />

==History==
During the events surrounding the rediscovery of ''[[Outbound Flight]]'', the appearance of a ''Paskla''-class vessel in unknown configuration was enough to alarm a senior [[Chiss/Legends|Chiss]] [[Commander/Legends|commander]] like [[General/Legends|General]] [[Prard'ras'kleoni|Drask]] and send the cruiser ''[[Chaf Envoy]]'' to combat stations; but when the cruiser identified itself as a refugee ship—part of a ruse by the [[Vagaari/Legends|Vagaari]], masquerading as peaceable [[Geroon (species)|Geroons]]—the Chiss accepted this claim at face value.<ref name="Survivor's Quest" />

The military configuration and true capabilities of the Vagaari ship were revealed, however, when she attacked and attempted to destroy the [[Brask Oto Command Station]] in a bid to penetrate [[The Redoubt/Legends|the Redoubt]]. Their attempts were only foiled by the combined efforts of the [[Chiss Ascendancy/Legends|Chiss Ascendancy]], the [[Empire of the Hand]], the ''Outbound Flight'' [[Survivors (Outbound Flight)|survivors]], and the [[Jedi Knight/Legends|Jedi Knights]] [[Luke Skywalker/Legends|Luke]] and [[Mara Jade Skywalker]] at the [[Battle of the Redoubt]].<ref name="Survivor's Quest" />
